evals.prompt: I'm building a STACK-X conference programme page with SGDS. I need a block for each session that shows: the time slot, the session title with an expand/collapse toggle, the speaker's name and organisation, outlined badges for type and hall, and a full abstract. Below the abstract, show the speaker's circular photo, name, job title, and a 'View profile' link. Output the block as an HTML snippet — no masthead, nav, or footer needed.
evals.expected_output: An HTML block using sgds-badge (outlined), sgds-divider, sgds-link, sgds-icon. Time slot uses sgds:text-overline-md with sgds:text-primary-default. Session title uses sgds:text-heading-md sgds:font-semibold. Body text uses sgds:text-body-md. Text colours use sgds:text-heading-default, sgds:text-body-default, sgds:text-body-subtle. Speaker avatar is 88x88px circular. No masthead/mainnav/footer.

assertions.description: Output includes sgds-badge elements with the outlined attribute
Output includes sgds-divider
Output includes sgds-link for the View profile link
Time slot uses sgds:text-overline-md
Session title uses sgds:text-heading-md
Body text uses sgds:text-body-md not sgds:text-base
Does not use raw sgds:text-base (wrong token)
Uses sgds:text-primary-default for the time slot colour
Uses sgds:text-heading-default for heading colour
Uses sgds:text-body-subtle for secondary text
Speaker avatar has border-radius for circular style
Output does not include sgds-masthead or sgds-mainnav
Does not use wrong sgds:text-color-* tokens

evals.prompt: I'm building an events website using SGDS web components. Can you give me a session listing item that shows an event talk's details? I need: the time of day as a small label, the talk title (with a collapse/expand chevron button), the presenter's name and their organisation, description text of the talk, tags for session type and venue, and a speaker card with their photo (circular), name, role, and a profile link.
evals.expected_output: An HTML block using SGDS components and correct typography tokens. Same requirements as eval 0 — correct semantic typography tokens, sgds-badge with outlined, sgds-divider at the bottom, sgds-link for profile. No page chrome.

assertions.description: Output includes sgds-badge elements with the outlined attribute
Output includes sgds-divider
Body text uses sgds:text-body-md not sgds:text-base
Does not use raw sgds:text-base (wrong token)
Does not use wrong sgds:text-color-* pattern
Time slot uses sgds:text-overline-md
Output does not include sgds-masthead

evals.prompt: My conference site needs a programme listing page built with SGDS. On the left I want a filter sidebar with checkboxes for: programme type (Keynote, Panel Discussion, Presentation), session time (Morning, Afternoon), and event hall (Hall A, Hall B, Hall C). On the right, show session results — each one should be a full session detail block with the time slot, title, speaker byline, outlined category badges, description, and a speaker profile card with circular photo and profile link. Give me the HTML for both the filter sidebar and one session detail block.
evals.expected_output: HTML containing both a filter sidebar (using sgds-checkbox-group and sgds-checkbox) and a session detail block (sgds-badge outlined, sgds-divider, sgds-link, correct typography tokens). No page chrome.

assertions.description: Filter sidebar uses sgds-checkbox-group
Session detail uses sgds-badge with outlined
Session detail has sgds-divider
Body text uses sgds:text-body-md not sgds:text-base
Does not use raw sgds:text-base
Profile link uses sgds-link
Output does not include sgds-masthead
